items.title: Pattern Library
items.text:
A collection of ready-to-use patterns. Copy and paste into any card.

Difficulty Levels:

  • Beginner - Simple, single-concept patterns
  • Intermediate - Combines multiple techniques
  • Advanced - Complex rhythms or generative elements

items.title: Basic Four-on-the-Floor
items.text:
s("bd*4")

Beginner - The foundation of house, techno, and disco.

items.title: Rock Beat
items.text:
s("bd*4, ~ sd ~ sd, hh*8")

Beginner - Classic rock/pop drum pattern with kick, snare, and hi-hats.

items.title: Breakbeat
items.text:
s("bd sd:1 [~ bd] sd:2").fast(2)

Intermediate - Syncopated breakbeat with ghost notes.

items.title: Minimal Techno
items.text:
s("bd bd, ~ cp ~ ~, hh*16").gain(0.8)

Beginner - Driving minimal techno beat with clap.

items.title: Hip Hop
items.text:
s("bd ~ ~ bd, ~ sd ~ sd, [~ hh]*8").slow(1.5)

Intermediate - Laid-back hip hop groove.

items.title: Complex Polyrhythm
items.text:
s("bd*4, sd*3, hh*5, cp*7").gain(0.7)

Advanced - Overlapping time signatures create evolving patterns.

items.title: Drum & Bass
items.text:
s("[bd ~ bd ~] [~ sd ~ ~], hh*8").fast(2)

Intermediate - Fast breakbeat foundation.

items.title: Simple Sub
items.text:
note("c2 ~ c2 ~").s("sawtooth").lpf(200).gain(0.6)

Beginner - Deep sub bass with rhythmic gaps.

items.title: Walking Bass
items.text:
note("c2 e2 g2 e2").s("sawtooth").lpf(400)

Beginner - Simple walking bass line.

items.title: Acid Bass
items.text:
note("c2 c2 c3 c2").s("sawtooth").lpf(slider(400, 100, 2000)).resonance(15)

Intermediate - Classic acid bass with filter slider. Sweep for that 303 sound.

items.title: Syncopated Bass
items.text:
note("c2 ~ [c2 eb2] ~, ~ g2 ~ ~").s("square").lpf(350).gain(0.5)

Intermediate - Off-beat accents create groove.

items.title: Octave Jump
items.text:
note("c2 c3 c2 c3").s("sawtooth").lpf(slider(300, 100, 1000)).gain(0.6)

Beginner - Simple octave pattern with filter control.

items.title: Simple Arpeggio
items.text:
n("0 2 4 7").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle")

Beginner - Basic minor arpeggio.

items.title: Fast Arp
items.text:
n("0 2 4 7 4 2").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle").fast(2)

Beginner - Faster arpeggio pattern with direction change.

items.title: Chord Stabs
items.text:
n("[0,3,7]").scale("C4:minor").s("sawtooth").lpf(1200).slow(2)

Intermediate - Minor chord stabs on half notes.

items.title: Scale Runner
items.text:
n("0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle").fast(2).gain(0.5)

Intermediate - Runs up the scale quickly.

items.title: Call and Response
items.text:
n("<[0 2 4] [7 5 3]>").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle").gain(0.5)

Intermediate - Alternates between ascending and descending phrases.

items.title: Generative Melody
items.text:
n("<0 2 3 5 7>*4").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle").room(0.3).gain(0.5)

Advanced - Slow cycle through scale degrees creates evolving melody.

items.title: Pad Drone
items.text:
n("0 3 7").scale("C3:minor").s("sawtooth").lpf(600).room(0.9).slow(4)

Beginner - Slow evolving pad chord.

items.title: Shimmer
items.text:
n("0 4 7 11").scale("C5:major").s("triangle").room(0.95).gain(0.3).fast(0.5)

Intermediate - High register shimmer texture.

items.title: Evolving Texture
items.text:
n("<0 2 4> <3 5 7>").scale("C3:minor").s("sawtooth").lpf(slider(500, 200, 2000)).room(0.9).slow(4).gain(0.3)

Advanced - Slowly shifting chord voicings with filter control.

items.title: Deep Space
items.text:
n("0 ~ 7 ~").scale("C2:minor").s("sine").room(0.99).delay(0.4).slow(8).gain(0.4)

Intermediate - Sparse, reverberant bass tones.

items.title: Noise Sweep
items.text:
s("noise").lpf(slider(200, 50, 5000)).gain(0.2)

Beginner - Filtered noise with sweep control. Great for builds.

items.title: Glitch Hits
items.text:
s("glitch:0 ~ glitch:2 ~").fast(2).gain(0.5)

Intermediate - Random glitch textures.

items.title: Riser
items.text:
s("noise*4").lpf(slider(200, 50, 8000)).hpf(slider(50, 20, 2000)).gain(0.15)

Intermediate - Two sliders for creating tension builds.

items.title: Full Arrangements
items.text: Copy these patterns to their respective cards for complete tracks.

items.title: Minimal Setup
items.text:
A simple, cohesive arrangement.

Card 1 (Drums): 

s("bd*4, ~ sd ~ sd, hh*8").gain(0.8)

Card 2 (Bass): 

note("c2 ~ c2 e2").s("sawtooth").lpf(300).gain(0.6)

Card 3 (Lead): 

n("0 2 3 5 3 2").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle").gain(0.5)

Card 4 (Pad): 

n("0 3 7").scale("C3:minor").s("sawtooth").lpf(600).room(0.8).slow(4).gain(0.4)

items.title: Dark Techno
items.text:
Heavy, driving techno arrangement.

Card 1 (Drums): 

s("bd*4, ~ cp ~ ~, hh*16").gain(0.85)

Card 2 (Bass): 

note("c1 ~ c1 c1").s("sawtooth").lpf(slider(250, 100, 800)).gain(0.7)

Card 3 (Stab): 

n("[0,3,7] ~ ~ ~").scale("C3:minor").s("sawtooth").lpf(1500).room(0.3).gain(0.4)

Card 4 (Texture): 

s("noise").lpf(slider(300, 50, 2000)).gain(0.1)

items.title: Ambient Chill
items.text:
Relaxed, atmospheric arrangement.

Card 1 (Light Percussion): 

s("~ hh ~ hh, ~ ~ rim ~").gain(0.4)

Card 2 (Bass): 

note("c2 ~ ~ e2").s("sine").lpf(400).gain(0.5).slow(2)

Card 3 (Melody): 

n("0 ~ 4 ~, ~ 7 ~ 5").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle").room(0.7).gain(0.4).slow(2)

Card 4 (Pad): 

n("0 3 7 10").scale("C3:minor").s("sawtooth").lpf(500).room(0.95).slow(8).gain(0.3)

items.title: Combining Patterns
items.text:
• Stay in key: Use the same scale (e.g., C:minor) across cards
  • Frequency separation: Bass low, melody mid, ambient spread
  • Dynamics: Use .gain() sliders for real-time mix control

items.title: Modifying Patterns
items.text:
Start with a pattern and experiment:

  • Change .fast(2) to .fast(4) for double speed
  • Swap scales: C:minor to C:major
  • Add effects: .room(0.5) or .delay(0.25)
  • Add sliders: .lpf(slider(800, 100, 4000))

Contribute a Pattern

Have a great pattern? We'd love to add it! See the Contributing Guide for instructions on submitting patterns to this library.

items.title: Pattern Syntax
items.text: Learn the mini notation language for writing patterns in r0astr.

items.title: Mini Notation Basics
items.text: r0astr uses Strudel's mini notation - a concise language for describing musical sequences.

items.title: Sequences
items.text:
Space-separated sounds play one after another within a cycle:

s("bd sd bd sd")  // Four sounds spread across one cycle

items.title: Rests (Silence)
items.text:
Use ~ to create silence:

s("bd ~ sd ~")  // Sound, silence, sound, silence

items.title: Multiplication
items.text:
Repeat a sound multiple times with *:

s("bd*4")     // Bass drum 4 times per cycle
s("hh*8")     // Hi-hat 8 times per cycle
s("bd*2 sd")  // Two kicks, then one snare

items.title: Subdivision
items.text:
Use [] to subdivide time - items inside share the parent's time slot:

s("bd [hh hh]")      // bd gets half, two hh share the other half
s("bd [sd sd sd]")   // bd gets half, three snares share the other half
s("[[bd bd] hh] sd") // Nested subdivision

items.title: Stacking (Layering)
items.text:
Use , to play sounds simultaneously:

s("bd*4, ~ sd ~ sd")           // Kick pattern + snare pattern together
s("bd*4, ~ sd ~ sd, hh*8")     // Full drum kit layered

items.title: Alternation
items.text:
Use <> to alternate between options each cycle:

s("<bd sd>")           // bd first cycle, sd second cycle
s("<bd sd cp>")        // Cycles through three sounds
note("<c3 e3 g3>")     // Cycles through three notes

items.title: Samples with s()
items.text:
Play built-in samples using s():

s("bd hh sd hh")       // Use sample names
s("bd:0 bd:1 bd:2")    // Different variations with :n

Common Sample Names:

Name Sound bd Bass drum / Kick sd Snare drum hh Hi-hat oh Open hi-hat cp Clap rim Rimshot tom Tom ride Ride cymbal

items.title: Synths with note()
items.text:
Generate tones using note() with note names:

note("c3 e3 g3")                    // Play notes
note("c3 e3 g3").s("sawtooth")      // Choose synth type
note("c3 e3 g3").s("triangle")      // Different synth

Synth Types:

Type Sound sawtooth Bright, buzzy (good for bass) triangle Soft, flute-like square Hollow, video-game style sine Pure tone, smooth

items.title: Scales with n()
items.text:
Use scale degrees instead of note names:

n("0 2 4 5").scale("C:major")       // C D E F
n("0 1 2 3").scale("C:minor")       // C D Eb F
n("0 2 4").scale("A3:minor")        // Am chord

items.title: Common Modifiers
items.text: Chain modifiers after your pattern to shape the sound:

items.title: Quick Reference
items.text: Modifier Description Range Example .gain(n) Volume level 0-1 .gain(0.5) .lpf(hz) Low-pass filter cutoff 20-20000 .lpf(800) .hpf(hz) High-pass filter cutoff 20-20000 .hpf(200) .fast(n) Speed up pattern 0.5-8 .fast(2) .slow(n) Slow down pattern 0.5-8 .slow(2) .room(n) Reverb amount 0-1 .room(0.5) .delay(n) Delay amount 0-1 .delay(0.25) .pan(n) Stereo position -1 to 1 .pan(-0.5)

items.title: Volume with .gain()
items.text:
Control volume from 0 (silent) to 1 (full):

s("bd*4").gain(0.8)                // 80% volume
s("hh*8").gain(0.3)                // Quieter hi-hats

items.title: Filters with .lpf() and .hpf()
items.text:
Low-pass filter removes high frequencies (makes sound duller):

note("c2").s("sawtooth").lpf(400)  // Dark bass
note("c2").s("sawtooth").lpf(2000) // Brighter bass

High-pass filter removes low frequencies (makes sound thinner):

s("bd*4").hpf(200)                 // Thin kick

items.title: Speed with .fast() and .slow()
items.text:
Change pattern speed:

s("bd sd bd sd").fast(2)           // 2x speed (8 hits per cycle)
s("bd sd bd sd").slow(2)           // Half speed (takes 2 cycles)

items.title: Reverb with .room()
items.text:
Add space and ambience:

note("c3 e3 g3").room(0.5)         // Medium reverb
note("c3 e3 g3").room(0.9)         // Large hall reverb

items.title: Sliders
items.text: Add interactive sliders to control values in real-time.

items.title: Basic Syntax
items.text:
slider(default, min, max)
  • default: Starting value
  • min: Minimum value
  • max: Maximum value

items.title: Usage Example
items.text:
note("c2 ~ c2 e2").s("sawtooth").lpf(slider(800, 100, 5000))

This creates a slider that: - Starts at 800 Hz - Can be adjusted from 100 Hz to 5000 Hz - Updates the filter in real-time as you drag

items.title: Multiple Sliders
items.text:
Each slider appears in the card's control area:

note("c2 ~ c2 e2")
  .s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(slider(800, 100, 5000))
  .gain(slider(0.6, 0, 1))

items.title: Example Patterns
items.text: Copy-paste these into r0astr to try them.

Four on the Floor

items.title: Bass
items.text:

Walking Bass 

note("c2 e2 g2 e2").s("sawtooth").lpf(400).gain(0.5)

Synth Bass 

note("c2 ~ c2 eb2, ~ ~ g2 ~").s("square").lpf(slider(300, 100, 1000)).gain(0.5)

items.title: Melody
items.text:
Arpeggiated Chord 

n("0 2 4 7").scale("C4:minor").s("triangle").gain(0.5)

Chord Stabs 

n("[0,2,4] ~ [0,2,4] ~").scale("C4:minor").s("sawtooth").lpf(1200).gain(0.4)

items.text:

Shimmer 

n("<0 2 4 5>").scale("C5:major").s("triangle").room(0.9).delay(0.3).slow(2).gain(0.3)

items.title: Combining Techniques
items.text:
Build complex patterns by combining these techniques:

// Evolving bass with slider control
note("c2 ~ [c2 c2] eb2")
  .s("sawtooth")
  .lpf(slider(400, 100, 2000))
  .gain(0.6)
  .room(0.2)

// Layered percussion
s("bd*4, [~ sd]*2, [hh hh hh ~]*2")
  .gain(slider(0.7, 0, 1))

items.title: Next Steps
items.text:
• Practice: Copy patterns above and modify them
  • Experiment: Change numbers, add modifiers, break things
  • Explore: See Multi-Instrument Guide for using multiple cards

items.title: Full Reference
items.text:
This guide covers the essentials. For the complete Strudel reference including all functions, patterns, and advanced techniques:

strudel.cc/learn
